title: hieracium reclinatum
intro: Hieracium reclinatum, also known as hawkweed or yellow hawkweed, is a flowering plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The leaves and flowers of this plant have been traditionally used in herbal medicine for their anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The medicinal properties of Hieracium reclinatum are believed to provide health benefits such as reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and treating skin conditions like acne and eczema. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, or used topically in the form of creams and salves for its medicinal properties.
